%% Auto-generated listings `literate' table.
%% STATUS (measured 2026-07-19): under LuaLaTeX these Unicode literate keys
%% do NOT match (listings tokenizes multibyte input differently), so this
%% table is inert there — glyph coverage in listings comes from the mono
%% font + STIX fallback configured in belief.tex.  The table is RETAINED
%% because it is exactly what the pdflatex/TAPS path needs (where literate
%% keys do match under inputenc utf8).  Prose Unicode is mapped to math
%% macros at pour time; newunicodechar actives are deliberately absent —
%% they derail \lstinline scanning (measured livelock).
\lstset{literate=%
  {¬}{{\ensuremath{\lnot}}}1%
  {·}{{\ensuremath{\cdot}}}1%
  {×}{{\ensuremath{\times}}}1%
  {ˢ}{{\ensuremath{{}^{\mathrm{s}}}}}1%
